creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 200646
patch to update math/saga from 7.0.0 to 7.1.1

This patch towards SAGA GIS version 7.1.1 brings some bug fixes and minor enhancements.

What the port update should do:
- Update from 7.0.0 to 7.1.1
- Change from llvm60 to llvm70
- Pet Portlint with a newline after USES section
- Renew patch-src_tools_io_io__shapes__las_Makefile.am
- Update pkg-plist


Tested with Poudriere (F11.2i/a, F12.0i/a, and HEADi/a).

'portlint -AC' seems fine.
